svg.text: The plan now: one clean causal result about how
authoritative plan 2026-07-10 — now operationalized into a Fri→Sun sprint (see the next figure); chips show what has already landed
Instrument & organism build (Colab lane, gates the Kaggle window)
Phase 1A — Qwen clean anchor grid: 4 judge conditions × 4 seeds × 4 rounds (Kaggle K1, ~9 h Saturday)
Phase 1B — OLMo conservative-judge inversion (Kaggle K2, ~14 h Saturday: 4 conditions × 3 seeds × 4 rounds)
The rest of the matrix runs in the same sprint — no longer future branches (see the sprint figure)

point, the stiffness, or the noise?
